response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, deep TypeScript/Node.js work in recent roles, current hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling development, and demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development). React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes experience align well with the stack. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin experience, and much of his frontend history is Ember rather than React. These are learnable for an engineer of this profile, so an interview is warranted.
strengths: 18+ years of full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js product work and AI-agent/MCP infrastructure development
Strong engineering culture fit: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, workshops and community teaching
Cloud and infrastructure experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) plus polyglot background including Java, C/C++, and D
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest/Jest/Playwright experience listed in the primary stack
Frontend depth skews toward Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one role
No Kotlin or Python experience mentioned despite the multi-language requirement

key_factors.factor: Current AI agent and MCP development work
Missing Nest.js/Vitest and limited React depth
